title: Undergraduate ML Research Assistant
description: Work with graduate mentors on model evaluation for student success prediction.
details: 10-15 hours/week. Prior project work in ML is strongly preferred. Includes weekly paper discussion.

title: HCI + EdTech Research Intern
description: Support mixed-methods research on student tooling and classroom workflows.
details: Includes interview synthesis, prototype testing, and lightweight frontend experiments.

title: Cloud Systems Performance Researcher
description: Benchmark distributed workloads and improve profiling pipelines for systems experiments.
details: Candidates should be comfortable reading systems papers and writing reproducible scripts.

title: Biostatistics Data Research Assistant
description: Analyze longitudinal health datasets and generate reproducible visual summaries.
details: Remote-friendly 8-12 hours/week role. Strong documentation habits required.

title: NLP Research Apprentice
description: Contribute to prompt evaluation benchmarks and error analysis for LLM tasks.
details: Weekly async updates; prior experimentation notebook examples encouraged in application.

title: Robotics Perception Lab Assistant
description: Build and evaluate perception pipelines for indoor navigation systems.
details: Hands-on role with sensors and simulation. Lab safety onboarding is required.

title: Civic Data Policy Research Fellow
description: Support policy memos and dashboards using city-level public datasets.
details: Ideal for students interested in social impact, public service, and applied analytics.

title: Digital Health UX Research Assistant
description: Conduct usability interviews and prototype review sessions for digital health tools.
details: Part-time role with clinical stakeholders. Strong communication and empathy expected.

title: Sustainable Energy Analytics Researcher
description: Model energy demand and build dashboards for campus sustainability projects.
details: Preferred experience: one class project involving forecasting or time-series analysis.

title: Cybersecurity Research Analyst
description: Assist with threat detection experiments and write concise findings summaries.
details: Role includes log analysis, basic scripting, and participation in weekly security briefings.
